list.vod_blurb: &nbsp;Mavka is a dangerous nymph of the forest lake that lure people into its depths for the mermaid
list.vod_content: Mavka is a dangerous nymph of the forest lake that lure people into its depths for the mermaids to feed on their energy. When she meets Lukian, a biology whizz, Mavka falls in love disrupting the natural order.
